plan.failureSummary: The chatbot on briefcase.chat is completely non-responsive. The test successfully entered questions and clicked suggested prompt starters, but the chatbot failed to generate any response bubbles. This is a persistent backend failure as evidenced by a 0% pass rate over the last 14 runs.
observedIndicators: Chatbot does not return or display any replies to user-entered questions or suggested prompt options
Persistent failure pattern (14 total runs, 0% pass rate)
Live screenshot shows user question submitted but blank chat area with no response bubble

remediationSteps.summary: Fix the briefcase.chat chatbot backend response system
remediationSteps.details: Investigate and resolve the backend issue on briefcase.chat preventing the chatbot from processing and returning responses. Check server logs and integration status with OpenAI or other LLM providers.

remediationSteps.summary: Verify downstream AI/LLM dependencies of the chatbot
remediationSteps.details: Ensure that API keys and external model APIs utilized by briefcase.chat are healthy, authorized, and not rate-limited or experiencing outages.

plan.notes: The UI shows that 7 messages are remaining, so the issue is not a quota exhaustion on the frontend but rather a backend failure to reply to queries. The screenshots confirm the user's message is displayed but no response is generated.
